objects.name: Instruction_type
objects.string:
Instructions:  
1)Press **a** to pick it up.(Bring  player near the object you want to pick up. )   2)Press **b** to drop it.  3)Then press **c** to check if the placement is correct.(Before checking placement, move player  away from the spot.)

content.text:
Instructions:  
1)Press **a** to pick it up.(Bring  player near the object you want to pick up. )   2)Press **b** to drop it.  3)Then press **c** to check if the placement is correct.(Before checking placement, move player  away from the spot.)

parameters: "TK: It doesn’t belong in a box that shuts. Only the seat that never stays still will hold it."
"Talking Cat: Welcome, seeker. This room is restless… its treasures are misplaced. Listen well,and I will guide you through my words. And my nickname is TK."

"TK: In this puzzle, your task is to return the cursed item to where it truly belongs. Sounds easy, doesn’t it? But make the wrong choice and you’ll never regret it. Four cursed items lie hidden here, and I won’t tell you what they are… only hints. You must find them yourself and place each in its rightful spot."
"TK: “Make the right move, and all is quiet. Make the wrong one… and you’ll suffer for it."
"TK: Here is how you play. Choose your cursed item and press (a) on the keypad, then press (b) to bring it to the desired location. Then press (c) if you dare… only then will the room judge you."
"TK: Okay now we should start the game with the first hint."
"TK: It doesn’t belong in a box that shuts. Only the seat that never stays still will hold it."
"TK: The doll settles into place… yes… the room approves. Don’t smile, seeker — it’s watching you."
"TK:  Next hint it will not rest on tables or chairs. Only the shelf already crooked will keep it."
"TK: Wrong spot try again. Villain will be hunting for you"
"TK: The crooked shelf embraces it… twisted, but true. Even broken things can be right, seeker"
"TK: Hopped to next hint the item will not be kept on a simple drawer. Only the cursed box waits to be opened."
"TK: Wrong! Try again... if you dare."
"TK: The cursed box groans open, then seals itself… the path is granted, seeker."
"TK: Next hint the item cannot be kept next to flower pot. Fire belongs only at the altar."
"TK:Wrong spot try again.Come on dont make the ghost angry"
"TK: The flame bows low, then steadies… perfect. The altar is hungry, and it accepts your gift, seeker."
"TK: Hmph… you actually did it. All four cursed items are bound again, and the room falls silent. The glow fades… and you are save.The game dont need you...Goodbye."

"TK: Finally you got it correct
Now is time to release you...Goodbye"
"TK: Hah! You still can’t get it right? Try again"
